tabs.label: Product Design
tabs.description: UI/UX Design prototypes and product flows

tabs.label: Interactive Design
tabs.description: Motion design, animations, and interactive prototypes

tabs.label: Graphic Design
tabs.description: Product graphics, illustrations, and visual designs

projects.title: MentorPlus
projects.description: A Figma prototype for MentorPlus app, a platform that helps final‑year students improve English communication and prepare for job interviews. The prototype demonstrates end‑to‑end user flows — designed with clear information hierarchy, microinteractions, and responsive layouts to make practice engaging.

projects.title: Tasty Bites
projects.description: A high-fidelity design prototype for a modern food ordering app. Features intuitive menu browsing, search functionality, customizable orders, real-time order tracking, seamless checkout, and user-friendly navigation. Designed in Figma with a focus on clean UI, accessibility, and engaging user experience.

projects.title: Apollo Hospital
projects.description: A Figma prototype for Apollo Hospital that enables users to discover available doctors, filter by specialty, experience, and availability, view detailed doctor profiles (ratings, consultation modes, and bios), select an appointment slot, and complete booking with calendar integration and confirmation.

projects.title: Hawkstack
projects.description: A modern landing page design for Hawkstack showcasing product features, benefits, and user engagement elements. Created in Figma with attention to visual hierarchy, user experience flows, and conversion-focused design patterns.

projects.title: JR Jewellers
projects.description: A sophisticated jewellery e-commerce app design featuring product browsing, detailed product views with 360° rotation, wishlist functionality, and seamless checkout. Designed with luxury aesthetics and intuitive navigation for premium user experience.

projects.title: Sneaker Spotlight
projects.description: A Figma prototype of a Jordan landing-page carousel featuring three distinct colorway screens and coordinated 3D motion. Uses Smart Animate, layered prototyping, and microinteractions to showcase product variations with smooth depth transitions and polished timing—designed for immersive product discovery.

projects.title: Carousel Animation
projects.description: A 3D Carousel Animation prototype created in Figma that explores motion, depth, and smooth transitions. This experiment focuses on UI motion design, 3D animation, and interaction design, using Smart Animate, layered prototyping, and microinteractions to make interfaces feel more dynamic and engaging.

projects.title: SuperNova Testimonials
projects.description: An interactive testimonial component design showcasing customer feedback, ratings, and profile information. Features smooth animations, interactive elements, and engaging micro-interactions to create a dynamic customer review experience.

projects.title: Air Conditioning Graphic
projects.description: A captivating air conditioning product graphic featuring detailed illustrations, 3D elements, and visual storytelling. The design explores temperature visualization, airflow patterns, and product benefits through engaging graphic design.

projects.title: iPhone Design Graphics
projects.description: Stunning iPhone product graphics showcasing device design, color variations, and technical specifications. Features premium product visualization with attention to light, shadow, and material aesthetics.

projects.title: AirPods Design Graphics
projects.description: Premium AirPods product graphic design showcasing the device from multiple angles with sophisticated visual presentation. Highlights product features, design details, and premium positioning through high-quality graphic design.

projects.title: Edullem
projects.description: A comprehensive graphic design portfolio piece featuring educational platform visualizations, user interface elements, and illustrative components. Combines visual communication, typography, and design systems thinking.
